query:
SELECT i.id, i.productId, i.tenantId, i.quantity, i.reservedQuantity, i.locationZone, wl.code as locationCode, wz.code as zoneCode
FROM inventory i
LEFT JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON i.locationId = wl.id
LEFT JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id
WHERE i.productId = 59188
LIMIT 10;

LEFT JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id
